title: 34 Inch Foil Letter Balloon – Silver or Rose Gold Alphabet A-Z, Large Helium Air Party Decorations for Birthday, Wedding, Anniversary, Baby Shower, Custom Name Banner Decor (SILVER, Letter D)
features: Extra-Large 34" Letter Balloons: Ideal for birthdays, weddings, anniversaries, baby showers, engagements and celebrations. Available in elegant silver and rose gold colours to create eye-catching custom names, initials or message displays.

Premium Foil Material: Made from thick, high-quality mylar foil for durability and shine. Safe, non-toxic, and suitable for both helium and air inflation. Perfect for indoor or outdoor party decorations that last throughout your event.

Easy Inflation & Self-Sealing: Each alphabet balloon features a reliable self-sealing valve that prevents air leakage. Inflate with helium or air using a pump, and hang easily with string or tape through pre-punched holes for neat banner displays.

Reusable & Cost-Effective: Designed for multiple uses, these metallic balloons can be deflated carefully and stored for future parties. Maintain their shape and colour after every use, making them a sustainable and budget-friendly décor choice.

Versatile Party Decor: Spell any name or phrase using A–Z letters for birthdays, weddings, anniversaries, graduations or baby showers. A perfect addition for home events, photo backdrops, bridal decorations and festive celebrations.
description: Product description Generic 34 Inch Foil Letter Balloon Celebrate in style with these large 34-inch foil alphabet balloons (approximately 86 cm when inflated) available in elegant silver and rose gold finishes. Perfect for birthdays, weddings, anniversaries, and other special occasions, these balloons help you create stunning, personalised decorations. Premium Quality: Made from durable foil material for a glossy metallic finish that lasts throughout your celebration. Large Size: Each balloon measures about 34 inches (approximately 86 cm when inflated), creating a bold and eye-catching display for parties and events. Easy to Inflate: Can be filled with helium or air using a standard pump or inflator. Self-sealing valve design makes inflation quick and simple. Reusable Design: Carefully deflate and store for reuse at future events, making it a cost-effective decoration choice. Customisable Décor: Choose from A–Z letters in silver or rose gold to spell out names, initials, or messages for your event. Versatile Use: Ideal for birthdays, baby showers, engagements, graduations, and party photo backdrops. Instructions Inflate gently with air or helium until the balloon is firm. Do not overinflate. Self-sealing valve closes automatically once inflated. Hang using the pre-punched holes to form banners or wall displays. Deflate with care if you wish to reuse the balloon. Caution / Warning Children can choke or suffocate on uninflated or broken balloons. Keep uninflated balloons away from children. Discard broken balloons immediately. Not suitable for children under 8 years. Use only under adult supervision. What You Get : 1 × 34" Letter Balloon (A–Z available) Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources. Do not release outdoors or near power lines. Always use a non-metallic ribbon and suitable weight.
